title: Form Field
description: Wrapper contract for label + control + helper + error. Composes input/select/textarea/checkbox/radio.

props.name: errorText
props.description: Optional error message; if present sets invalid state and aria links.

states.name: invalid
effects: Control has aria-invalid and aria-describedby includes error id.

keyboard: Keyboard behavior is delegated to the wrapped control.
aria: Label is programmatically associated with control.
Helper and error text are linked via aria-describedby.
Required is indicated via native required attribute or aria-required (if non-native).

must: Label association must be correct for all controls.
Error and helper messages must be linked via aria-describedby.
should: Reserve space for helper/error text to reduce layout shift.
must_not: Do not show both helper and error with the same id; keep them distinct.

token_usage.notes: Use danger accent for icon/indicator, not low-contrast text.

examples.title: Wrapper skeleton
